knowledge_boundary: Only landing + prior_sections + active packet content.

exercises.code:
# skeptic/B1: packet-only for S04-T1-A-E1
regiones = ["Lima", "Cusco", "Piura"]
for r in regiones:
    print(r)
print(list(range(3)))
exercises.justification_from_packet: [B1/Skeptic] Solo acepto S04-T1-A-E1 si el paquete lo enseña. Instrucción: «E1 (guiado) — Dada `regiones = ["Lima", "Cusco", "Piura"]`, imprime cada región en su propia línea con un `for`. Luego imprime `list(range(3))`.». Demo iDo `S04-T1-B-DEMO` del paquete (Recorrer lote de registros sintéticos con for y range): «lote = [ {"id": "C001", "edad": 30}, {"id": "C002", "edad": 17},». Hint packet: «for r in regiones: print(r)». Rechazo APIs ajenas; me limito a `regiones` / `print(`. Heading de teoría: «for, range y secuencias».

lines = ["r1", "r2", "", "r3"]

    out.append(line)

# skeptic/B1: packet-only for S04-T2-B-E3
buf = ["a", "b", "END"]
i = 0
out = []

        raise RuntimeError("guard")

    i += 1
    if line == "END":
        break
    out.append(line)
print(out)

exercises.code:
# skeptic/B1: packet-only for S04-T3-A-E2
def tasa_reject(sts):
    n_total = len(sts)
    if not n_total:
        return None
    n_reject = sum(1 for s in sts if s == "reject")
    return n_reject / n_total

print(tasa_reject(["accept", "reject", "accept"]))
print(tasa_reject([]))
exercises.justification_from_packet: [B1/Skeptic] No invento nada fuera del packet para S04-T3-A-E2. Instrucción: «E2 (independiente) — Calcula `tasa_reject = n_reject / n_total` para sts del E1. Luego calcula tasa para lista vacía sin ZeroDivisionError (imprime None).». Contraste con demo `S04-T3-A-DEMO` (continue salta vacíos; break corta en ERROR fatal): «lines = ["", "ok:1", "", "ok:2", "ERROR", "ok:3"] kept = [] for ln in lines:». Hint packet: «if n_total: tasa = n_rej/n_total else None». Tokens verificables en mi code: `tasa_reject` / `n_reject`. Heading de teoría: «De “Funciones & Módulos” a iteración y resúmenes (mapa de la sección)».

selfcheck.question: ¿Qué produce list(range(3))?
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: [B1/Skeptic] Skeptic: stop is exclusive — range(3) → 0,1,2. So list(range(3)) is [0,1,2], not 1..3 or including 3.

selfcheck.question: zip([1,2,3],[10,20]) sin strict…
selfcheck.chosen_text: Empareja solo (1,10) y (2,20); el 3 se pierde en silencio
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: [B1/Skeptic] Skeptic: zip stops at the shorter sequence; third element of the longer side is lost silently unless you use other APIs. No ValueError, no None pad, no cartesian product in the card.

selfcheck.question: Para la tasa de reject del gate, el denominador debe ser…
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: [B1/Skeptic] Skeptic: rates for CP-N1-A use n_error/n_total with denominator = attempted records, not only accepts. reject_rate follows the same rule.

selfcheck.question: ¿Qué hace continue en un for de líneas de intake?
selfcheck.chosen_text: Salta al siguiente ciclo del bucle
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: [B1/Skeptic] Skeptic: continue jumps to the next loop iteration (e.g. skip empty intake lines); break exits the loop. continue does not end the program or delete the list.

selfcheck.question: Un doble for anidado sobre n elementos es aproximadamente…
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: [B1/Skeptic] Skeptic: nested double for over n elements is described as quadratic cost O(n²); avoid nesting two loops over the same batch without need.
